title: Per-story briefing
description: The central analytical artifact: per-bucket corpus assembled from a snapshot, written by analytical.build_briefing. Consumed by analytical.build_metrics, the LLM analyze prompt, analytical.validate_analysis (citation grounding via signal_text_idx, which is the corpus[] position), and publication.build_index. The corpus[] order and field names are the cross-stage hand-off contract — renaming or reordering silently breaks downstream consumers.

meta_version.description: Methodology pin version this briefing was produced under (added by meta.stamp()).

n_articles.description: Kept-corpus count (== len(corpus)). The candidate count (pre per-bucket dedup) is intentionally not exposed.

signal_breakdown.description: Counts of corpus[] entries by signal_level.

corpus.description: Per-article entries. The position `i` is the signal_text_idx the LLM analyze step cites by — order matters and must be stable.
